mapper.sql: operation_id, requested_by_user_id, agent_id, status, current_step, error_code, error_message, process_id, service_address, trace_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: update opencode_process_start_operations set status = #{status}, current_step = #{currentStep}, error_code = null, error_message = null, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where operation_id = #{operationId}

update opencode_process_start_operations set status = #{status}, current_step = #{currentStep}, error_code = null, error_message = null, process_id = #{processId}, service_address = #{serviceAddress}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where operation_id = #{operationId}

update opencode_process_start_operations set status = #{status}, current_step = #{currentStep}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where operation_id = #{operationId}
